SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF IVAN RIVERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GLENN KWAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KWAN, GLENN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT RIVERA, IVAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
